name: ruby-pkg-config
title: ruby-pkg-config
description:
pkg-config implementation for Ruby
pkg-config can be used in your extconf.rb to properly detect necessary
libraries for compiling native Ruby extensions, using the pkg-config database.
Note that this package does not use pkg-config, only its database.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-pkg-config because pkg-config implementation for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-pkg-config as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-pkg-config with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-pkg-config --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
